title: pelargonium × ramulosum
intro: Pelargonium × ramulosum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Pelargonium genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and topical creams for medicinal use, with the essential oil being a popular choice for aromatherapy and skincare applications.
